seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient is a 33-year-old female named Janet
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient is here for joint pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's joint pain is mostly in her knees
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's knee pain affects both knees equally
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has been doing more stair-type workouts
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient expected stair-type workouts to build muscle around her knees and help them
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Despite stair workouts, the patient's knees have been really bothering her
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies pain in other joints such as elbows or shoulders currently
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient had a rotator cuff repair about two years ago
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's rotator cuff repair was on the right shoulder
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has not had shoulder problems since the rotator cuff repair
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies pins and needles in her feet
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies swelling in her legs
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports she has diabetes
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient looks out for foot symptoms and leg swelling because she has diabetes
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports her blood sugars have been under control
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies fever
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies chills
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies nausea
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies vomiting
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies chest pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies shortness of breath
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has high blood pressure
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient monitors her blood pressure
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has been taking medication for high blood pressure
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports her blood pressure has not elevated since the onset of joint pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician notes the patient takes Norvasc 5 mg a day
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient confirms she has been taking Norvasc 5 mg every day
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician states the patient's blood pressure is pretty high today
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician suggests the patient might be a little nervous contributing to high blood pressure today
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam, the patient's neck is soft with no enlarged thyroid
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam, the patient's heart has a regular rate and rhythm
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam, the patient's lungs are clear
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam, the patient's abdomen is soft
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam, the patient's left knee has slight erythema
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam, the patient's left knee has slight edema
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam, there is a small effusion over the patient's left knee
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam, the patient has decreased flexion and extension of the left knee
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam, the patient's lower extremity strength is good
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient had left knee x-rays performed when she came in
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician interprets the left knee x-ray as normal
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician thinks the patient may have a strain in her knees
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician notes the patient's white blood cell count is not elevated
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Based on the white blood cell count, the clinician is not concerned about an infection
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician notes the patient's A1c is a little elevated
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician states the A1c elevation is not terrible
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to continue the patient on her current diabetes regimen
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to send autoimmune labs to work up the patient's left knee pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans for the patient to do physical therapy for joint pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to give the patient anti-inflammatory medication to help with pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient agrees with the proposed plan for joint pain management
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician orders meloxicam 15 mg once a day
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician orders a physical therapy referral
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician orders an autoimmune profile
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Because the patient's blood pressure is a little elevated today, the clinician wants her to continue to monitor it at home
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician asks the patient to send a blood pressure report in the next couple of weeks
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has a blood pressure cuff at home
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to order a lipid profile for the patient
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to continue the patient on metformin 500 mg twice a day
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician
